title: carduus defloratus var. ceretanus
intro: Carduus defloratus var. ceretanus, also known as the French thistle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the western Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Carduus defloratus var. ceretanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
